description_long: This house features a striking geometric exterior with a bold pattern of black, white, and red stripes and angular shapes across its surfaces. The structure is primarily rectangular with a prominent cantilevered section extending from one side, creating a modern, asymmetrical silhouette. Large, dark-tinted windows wrap around the front and side, providing ample natural light and a contemporary aesthetic. The roof is flat and visually segmented by alternating colored panels, enhancing the modernist appeal. The entryway is recessed and understated, blending into the facade without ornate detailing, and the overall design emphasizes clean lines and minimalism. The house appears to be constructed from concrete or composite panels, glass, and steel, typical of modern urban residential architecture.
description: A modern, geometric house with bold black, white, and red patterns, large tinted windows, and a flat segmented roof. Its asymmetrical design and cantilevered section give it a striking, contemporary look.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main facade with large tinted windows and the cantilevered section extending to the right.
description_view_1: Rear view highlights the segmented flat roof and the back extension, with less window area visible.
description_view_2: Side view displays the full length of the cantilevered section and the geometric window arrangement.
description_view_3: Opposite rear view emphasizes the alternating roof panels and the minimal window presence on this side.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed, minimal entryway with no visible steps or porch, blending into the geometric facade
